channel.title: +Grass on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Grass on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Ritual
item.description: Goosegrass Eleusine Indica, बल्बज, करडि-हुल्लु. Crow-foot-grass. A famine food. Low yield. Relative of millets. दर्भः Desmostachya bipinnata, commonly known in English by the names halfa grass, big cordgrass, and salt reed-grass. Aka kusha. Branches from the base, erect from a stout creeping rootstock. darbha-1 darbha-collected बॆङ्गळूरुनगरे स्रोतश् चन्द्रादयः। Visit the ICAR - Horticultural Research Institute. As a special gesture they allow Dvijas with kachcham (only on amAvAsya with mAgha star?), entry reportedly allowed before 2PM.

item.title: Saccharum
item.description: Intro A family of tall reed like grasses. मुञ्जः Saccharum munja - a grass found in arid areas and along river banks काशः Saccharum spontaneum, wild sugarcane Sugar canes Saccharum officinarum
